bio: Mohammad Mokhber served as First Vice President under [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) from 2021 until Raisi's death in the helicopter crash of May 2024. He then served as acting president for fifty days until [Masoud Pezeshkian](/people/masoud-pezeshkian) was elected. Previously he headed the Setad (Execution of [Imam Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini)'s Order), one of the largest and most opaque conglomerates in Iran, controlled directly by the Supreme Leader.
editorial_notes: Acting president May–July 2024 after Raisi's death.
